verses.text: “Ngasa siahna sikkawi tawh Awle manzo ding a, khauhual khat tawh a leii henzo ding na hi hiam
A nakpheh-ah khau vawhzo ding a, a khaguh-ah sikkawi bulhzo ding na hiam
Amah in na khahna ding hong thum ding a, na hehpihna ding hong ngen ding ahi hiam
Na sila ahi tawntung dingin nangma tungah thu hong ciam ding ahi hiam
Na nasem numeite na mawlpih bangin mawlpihzo ding a, vasa khawi bangin bawlzo ding na hi hiam
Ngasa bengte in lei dingin hong deek ding a, sa zuakte in zuak dingin a sa sem ding ahi hiam
Ngasa khawhna teipi tawh a vun khawhletzo ding a, teipi lingnei tawh a lutang khawhletzo ding na hi hiam
Khatvei sukhin lecin na hihkik nawn kei ding a, tua na sutna thu na mangngilh nawn kei ding hi
“Awle a mu mi peuhmah lau-in lei-ah a puk uh hi
Awle a heh ciangin kihtakhuai mahmah a, ama omna mai-ah kuamah om ngamlo hi
Leitunga om mihingte lakah Awle a suk manin a sihlawhlo kua om ahi hiam
“Awle khete, a guh a taang, a thahatna ziate genloin ka om thei kei hi
Kua in ama puan tungnung hawkkhiatsak zo a, a sik puanpi sunletzo ahi hiam
A kihtakhuai a hate a kam sungah om ahih manin, kua in ama kam phensak ngam ahi hiam
A nungzang sukah a lipte lum bangin kithuapsuk cinten a, suang bangin sakin kimatcip bikbek ciat hi
Tua lipte khatlekhat kithuapcip bikbek ahih manin, khatlekhat kikalah huih nangawn thawl zolo hi
Tuate kinak mat lua ahih manin, bangmah in phelkhia zolo hi
Amah a hetchiai ciangin mei-ek bangin taang zaizai a, a mittangte nisuak bangin a taang hi
A kam panin mei kuangkhia a, mei-ek leengkhia zaizai hi
A nak panin meikhu suak a, selkeu khu tawh kibang hi
Ama husan'na in mei tawhkuang a, ama kam panin meikuang a suakkhia hi
A ngawng zong thakhauh mahmah ahih manin, a gim thei hetlo thatang a nei ahi hi
A vun tung khempeuh a nipna mun mahmah omlo a, sik peek bangin a sak kim hi
A lungsim in suangtum bangin kihtak khat zong neilo a, an gawina suang bangin sakin do lah neilo hi
Amah hong kithawi ciangin mi thahat pente nangawn lau a, kihta mahmah uh ahih manin cihna ding theiloin a om uh hi
Namsau tawh a kisut hangin bunzo vetlo a, teipi leh thaltangte in zong bunzo tuan hetlo hi
Ama-a' dingin sikte, buhkung bangin nip a, sumngote nangawn sing muatsa bang lel hi
Amah khua a phawksakzo ding, thaltang omlo a, suang tawh a kiden' ciangin anvai them tu bang lel hi
Ama-a' dingin molhtum pen buhkung bang hi lel a, teipi tawh a kikhawh ciangin a nuihsan lel hi
A khecinte, beelpei kitamte tawh kibang a, lam a pai ciangin leilak kuikek gawp hi
Amah in tuipi tokin beel sunga tuiso bangsakzo a, sathau sa sunga tui tu bangin tuipi phuansak zaizai zo hi
A painasa khempeuhah tuihual om dandan a, tuipi phuansak pheuphau hi
Amah tehpih theih ding leitungah bangmah omlo a, bangmah kihtak a nei hetlo ganhing ahi hi
Amah in a kihtakhuai ganhing a kihisak pente nangawn nuai-et lai a, amah pen gamsa khempeuh' kumpi ahi hi,” a ci hi.
